overview: I upgraded my RAG pipeline by migrating from ChromaDB to Pinecone, adding agentic retrieval, and building an MCP-style tool server. Agentic RAG scored 4.3 vs 4.0 but cost 66% more tokens.

keyPoints.title: MCP: one tool file, every agent benefits automatically
Agentic vs. standard RAG is a cost-benefit tradeoff
Idempotent upserts prevent duplicate vectors silently
